name: Balatro
description: Trainer for Balatro (Proton, v1.0.1o). Uses Lua injection to execute code in the game's LuaJIT VM. The on_enable_lua hooks into love.update to continuously enforce values. on_disable_lua removes the hook.

fields.name: Infinite Money
fields.description: Sets money to 999 and hooks love.update to maintain it every frame.
fields.on_enable_lua: G.GAME.dollars = 999; if not _ss then _ss = {} end; _ss.dollars = true; if not _ss.patched then _ss.patched = true; local _u = love.update; love.update = function(dt) if _ss.dollars then G.GAME.dollars = 999 end; return _u(dt) end end
